item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly refuses the requested next manual verification gate, reframes the issue as a repeated pattern of adding human checks after front-end data/rule failures, and moves responsibility upstream to source control and ownership.
